testcase.name: Template Management › should display template management page

failure.message: templates.spec.ts:88:7 should display template management page

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › templates.spec.ts:88:7 › Template Management › should display template management page
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('heading', { name: /templates/i }) Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('heading', { name: /templates/i })
93 | 94 | // Verify page structure > 95 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: /templates/i })).toBeVisible(); | ^ 96 | await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /create template/i })).toBeVisible(); 97 | }); 98 | at /Users/mac/workspace/iGreenProduct/igreen-front/e2e/templates.spec.ts:95:69
